text: Dashboard shell completed. Core layout stabilized.
Log structure upgraded to ISO-8601 format. Event typing enabled for Renoria interface v2.
System structure stabilized. Core layout and component order defined for Renoria interface v2.
Custom domains renoria.dev and renoria.it linked to the Renoria node. DNS routing operational.
Logo assets integrated. Visual identity module attached to the Renoria node.
Portfolio shell in development. Additional modules pending.
Primary contact gateway connected to Renoria node.
Domain secured and public node initialized.
